feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: My professional website, displaying my projects and other work in statistics and data science.

entry.title: First Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello and welcome to my blog! This will just be a short first post detailing some of the things you can expect to see on this section of my website.

While I have a separate “Projects” page here to display my more involved statistics/data science work, I plan to use this space for writings on various other topics that interest me.

Things I May Post About

  • Mathematics: concepts often seen in stats, math education, history, and more!
  • NLP and Linguistics: explainers on things like syntax, grammar, etc.; unique aspects and quirks of global languages and my personal journeys in learning them
  • History of Science: short stories and historical notes on some big ideas in math and science throughout history

I look to put up a good variety of posts in the future (hopefully on a consistent basis). That means posts varying in content — for example, falling into one of the categories mentioned above — as well as a mix up more involved, in-depth posts as well as “microblogging” posts where I simply want to get some of my quick thoughts out there.

So with that, I look forward to providing much more content in the future, thanks for visiting my site, and I hope you stick around to hear more from me very shortly!
entry.summary: An introductory post to explain my plans for this blog
